summary: Iteration 14 - Personal Agent Feature Testing. All 14 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified successfully including: marketplace returns 25 agents, personal agents have locked flag, deploy returns 403 for free plan users, Personal Agents section with PRO+ badge, Upgrade to Pro buttons navigate to /pricing with toast message, Personal type filter works, search functionality works, Chat page shows gold channel icons.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 14 successfully verified the Personal Agent feature. Key test results: (1) GET /api/agents/marketplace returns 25 agents (22 business + 3 personal), (2) Personal agents (Alex, Luna, Max) have locked=true for free plan, (3) POST /api/agents/deploy returns 403 for personal agents on free plan with message 'Personal agents are available from the Pro plan. Upgrade to access.', (4) Frontend shows Personal Agents section with PRO+ badge, (5) Personal agent cards show lock icon and 'Upgrade to Pro' button, (6) Clicking 'Upgrade to Pro' shows error toast and navigates to /pricing, (7) Personal type filter with crown icon shows only 3 personal agents, (8) Search functionality filters agents correctly, (9) Business agents show 'Deploy Agent' button normally, (10) Dashboard loads correctly with all sections, (11) Chat page shows gold channel icons (WhatsApp, Telegram, Instagram). Test-ids verified: agent-card-alex, agent-card-luna, agent-card-max, deploy-alex, deploy-luna, deploy-max, view-marketplace, view-my-agents, agent-search, create-agent-btn.

GET /api/agents/marketplace.locked_flag: true for personal agents on free plan

POST /api/agents/deploy (personal agent).error_message: Personal agents are available from the Pro plan. Upgrade to access.

frontend_agents_page.personal_agents_cards: Alex, Luna, Max with lock icons
frontend_agents_page.upgrade_button: Shows 'Upgrade to Pro' for personal agents
frontend_agents_page.upgrade_toast: Personal Agent available from Pro plan. Upgrade!
frontend_agents_page.type_filters: All, Sales, Support, Scheduling, SAC, Onboarding, Personal
